zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Spendlove於1478年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Edward Spendlove18歲，母親Alice Emme Bleckney13歲。她於1497年之前與Edward Bestney II在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Spendlove于1478年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Edward Spendlove18岁，母亲Alice Emme Bleckney13岁。她于1497年之前与Edward Bestney II在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spendlove
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname presumably for someone who was free with his affections, from Middle English spend(en) ‘(to) spend or squander’ (Old English spend(an)) + love ‘love’ (Old English lufu).

variants.name: Spensley
meanings: English (Durham and Yorkshire): probably a variant of Spendley, itself a variant of Spendlove , in which the consonant cluster /ndl/ has become pronounced /nsl/.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Spendlove was born in 1478, in Suffolk, England, her father, Edward Spendlove, was 18 and her mother, Alice Emme Bleckney, was 13. She married Edward Bestney II before 1497, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1557, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.Barton St David, Somerset, England, Unit: Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Spendlove est née en 1478, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edward Spendlove, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alice Emme Bleckney, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Bestney II avant 1497, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1557, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.Barton St David, Somerset, England, Unit: Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Spendlove 1478 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Spendlove 18 und ihre Mutter Alice Emme Bleckney 13. Sie hat vor 1497 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England Edward Bestney II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Edward Bestney II prima del 1497, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.Barton St David, Somerset, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Spendlove(이)가 1478년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Spendlove(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Emme Bleckney(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1497년 이전 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Edward Bestney II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Edward Bestney II antes 1497, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. ru.Barton St David, Somerset, England, Unit: бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Spendlove родилась в 1478 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Spendlove было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Emme Bleckney, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Bestney II перед 1497 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1557 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.
